name: urbanmorph
description: Plugins from UrbanMorph — markdown collaboration tools and adjacent utilities for AI workflows.

plugins.name: mdshare
plugins.description: Free markdown sharing via MCP. Upload markdown files to mdshare.live and get shareable URLs with four permission tiers (admin/edit/comment/view), inline-anchored comments, real-time sync, and 90-day expiry — no login required. The MCP server uses file_path so large markdown files don't burn conversation tokens.
